chain.thought: Explanation: In the table, sites with pictures are indicated by an asterisk (*) before the site name. The entries with asterisks are Itsukushima and Sandan-kyō, so there are 2 scenic places with pictures.

judge_thought: Explanation: In the table, an asterisk before the site name indicates entries with pictures. Only row 3 (*itsukushima) and row 4 (*sandan-kyō) have asterisks, so there are 2 scenic places with pictures.
